Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Queen Shyrax]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 12''' — Queen Shyrax pursues victory no matter what.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 15''' — Shyrax was competing for control of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 15''' — Shyrax folded her arms and leaned back in her seat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 15''' — Shyrax stated she awaits her invitation and has work to do.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — Queen Shyrax and her rebels are rumored to be in this sector.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 2''' — Shyrax is a Karoshan woman and the Queen of Karosha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 3''' — Queen Shyrax is the commander of a personal battlecruiser.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 3''' — Shyrax is a Highness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — Shyrax is a Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — Shyrax possesses a personal training room that is a hundred yards long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — Shyrax is a leader who has soldiers under her command.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — Shyrax is a member of the crew who has refused transport until she finished giving orders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — Shyrax uses telekinesis to strap her armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Shyrax opened the back of the prison cell wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Shyrax can manifest a golden dragon's wing from her back for protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — Shyrax was aboard the bridge of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Shyrax projected the Advocate ships' actions into a hologram.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 18''' — Shyrax's command can echo in the Aether.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — Shyrax is a member of the crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Shyrax's hair-strands emanate golden light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Queen Shyrax is a journeyman Technician.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Queen Shyrax's Technician gift is called t’rshentha or Enhancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Queen Shyrax has not yet completed her masterwork.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Queen Shyrax intends to sharpen the Fallen Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — Shyrax is a source for empowering weapons in the envisioned fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 26''' — Shyrax feels older than the Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Shyrax possesses a fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 30''' — Shyrax is a Karoshan with large yellow hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Shyrax is a member of the crew and was previously the Captain's bodyguard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Shyrax believes the Alliance will harvest them for genetics to make new Perfected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 33''' — Queen Shyrax took Mell and may have entered an agreement with the crew of the Zenith Starship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — Shyrax inspects a holographic map of the system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — Shyrax is a teammate of the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — Shyrax responds to the Captain's command.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — Shyrax has golden eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — Shyrax is addressed as Your Highness and Commander.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 41''' — Shyrax has people to defend who mostly travel with them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Shyrax returned to her fleet and was instructing her children with battle-maps.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Shyrax is the exiled Queen of Karosha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Shyrax is nine feet tall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Shyrax is the Rebel Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Shyrax uses a wand that glows gold at the tip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 54''' — Shyrax rallied her forces and the Advocates against Starhammer.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — The narrator needs to check on Shyrax.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — Shyrax is a Captain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — Shyrax is Queen Shyrax the Third.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — Shyrax has skin of dull bronze and gold hair-cables.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — Shyrax wears armor plating with elaborate dragon designs and disguised shield generators.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — Shyrax carries a force-blade and a wand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — Shyrax is willing to live with the consequences of using magic in a specific way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Shyrax is the crew's Commander.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Shyrax believes the Zenith Cannon's technology will be invaluable for reclaiming Karosha.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — The Karoshan agent is compared in age to Shyrax's son.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — Sola's intensity reminded the narrator of Shyrax.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — The Perfected have ships given to Shyrax in a chokehold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Shyrax's ships are dark and rectangular in shape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Shyrax wears ornate battle armor that is black worked in gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Shyrax cut through the Karoshans on the bridge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Shyrax told her former soldiers to stand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — Shyrax is an Aether Technician on Varic's crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — Shyrax intends to monitor Benri Vallenar's behavior.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — Shyrax is a character who can glance back over others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — Shyrax uses Perfected infiltration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Shyrax is someone Varic orders to be contacted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Shyrax focused the enhancement systems on the engines.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 32''' — Shyrax has rebels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Shyrax is someone Horizon needs to get.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Shyrax materialized onto the bridge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — Shyrax wields a golden force-blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — Shyrax was fighting a Perfected Karoshan with green skin and blue Combat Art.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Shyrax uses a wand and magic of enhancement and amplification.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Shyrax is a character who can be freed to help wake others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Shyrax woke Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — Shyrax is part of a group that can draw up battle plans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — Shyrax is a person the Captain intends to put in charge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — Shyrax is a crew member of The Last Horizon who entered the call.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — Shyrax notes the energy capacity restrictions of the Divine Titans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — Shyrax is a leader or authority figure on the bridge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Shyrax provides scans and tactical information to the crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Shyrax reports on the ship's shields.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Shyrax was seen looking into the distance on monitors.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — Shyrax can lend Technicians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Shyrax rules over the planet Basyrryx.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Shyrax is the Commander of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Shyrax's children are hidden across the galaxy from Felrex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 7''' — Shyrax's spells come from a variant of draconic magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 7''' — The narrator was once Shyrax’s bodyguard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Shyrax studies monitors and checks sensor data.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Shyrax asks what can be done with the core components of an Iron Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Shyrax requested the deployment of ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Shyrax's fist is covered by golden energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Shyrax can activate a fleet support system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Shyrax is a member of The Last Horizon's crew who nearly tore the bridge apart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — Shyrax is the Guardian of Shadow Ark and the Commander of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — Shyrax has a twin brother named Veshran.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — Shyrax is a member of the crew who can project footage from her optical implant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 21''' — Shyrax has fought against Felrex.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Shyrax has a gigantic chair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 24''' — Shyrax's children could be in danger if the ship were destroyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Shyrax is observing the battlefield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Shyrax exulted in her heart after defeating the enemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Shyrax is giving orders during the combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Shyrax grants permission to engage personally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Shyrax has a wand as thick as a human arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Shyrax directs the fleet using a communicator and console.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Shyrax's jaw tightened during the discussion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Shyrax believes Omega does not deserve to be executed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 35''' — Shyrax claims to be a hunter without peer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Shyrax is a Commander with a massive bronze fist and cable braids.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Commander Shyrax has a braid of thick cables that glow yellow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 36''' — Shyrax was betrayed by Felrex a few years after her reign began.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — Shyrax is the sister of Veshran and a Karoshan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Shyrax has a ship with a hull breach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Shyrax was seen floating in a debris field with pearls of blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Shyrax would die first if the Galactic Union targeted the Karoshan Alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Shyrax was in Medical.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
